visa_types.overview:
Overview
It is applicable in case you are travelling for training or education exchange. This visa is given for a period of the stay up to 90 days within 180 days.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
It is applicable in case you are travelling for training or education exchange. This visa is given for a period of the stay up to 90 days within 180 days.

## Visa Fees
Effective date: 1st Mar 2026

[Table:  Training/Education Exchange Visa]
*Please Note：The consul reserves himself a right to change the visa fee according to the Schengen visa code and other relevant laws after reviewing the application.
Above mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid by cash or MOBILE PAYMENT in RMB.

## Exemption of Visa Fee:
- Children below 6 years on the date of submission
- School pupils, students, postgraduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake stays for the purpose of study or educational training
- Researchers from third countries travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research
- Representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organizations
- Family member of EU/EEA and Switzerland nationals

## Logistic Fee
Service Charge for Visa Application – 63 RMB per person

To make your visa application journey more comfortable, please avail benefits of
                                                                            our optional Additional Services. (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/pol/premium-services)
Applicants submitting visa applications for humanitarian reasons will be exempt from service fees.
Please Note: 
The applicable visa fee in RMB is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice. 

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/pol/travel-insurance)
Checklist for Training/Education Exchange Visa 

## Photo Specifications
Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/pol/phone-camera) to take visa photo with mobile phone
All photos must meet the requirements listed below. If these requirements have not been met, the applicant will have to deliver a new photo that meets the requirements. The photo
                                                                            requirements are the same for children as for adults.

## The Photo shall:
- be in sharp focus, clear and with good contrasts
- be printed on quality photo paper with high solution
- be in colours with a light background
- be 35x45 mm in width
- maximum 6 months old, resemble the applicant
- full-face, facing the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- show the whole head and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80 % of the picture
- show open eyes that are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes

## Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot be coloured
- the rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be reflection in the glasses

## Regarding head-dress:
Religious head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly shown.
- Chin, forehead and both cheeks shall all be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face due to the head-dress are not allowed

## Processing Time
Counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of this application is required, for example,
                                                                            when you are requested to come to an interview or submit additional documentation.

## Download Forms
Schengen Visa Form - Online (https://eforms.vfsglobal.com/pol/en/login) 
 Schengen Visa Form 
Note - The applicant has to carry the downloaded filled form while visiting the centre for submission as a mandatory requirement. Applicants can either log in to complete the form online or download the PDF and fill it digitally.
IMPORTANT NOTE: You are requested to fill-up your online visa application form maximum 5 days prior to your scheduled appointment. Please fill in the visa application via https://eforms.vfsglobal.com/pol/en/login (https://eforms.vfsglobal.com/pol/en/login) before turning up at the visa application centre to submit your documents.

visa_types.name: NATIONAL VISA
visa_types.overview:
JURISDICTION TO APPLY
Applicants should submit their applications to the relevant Visa Application Centre according to their place of residence. Applications submitted in Beijing will be assessed by the Embassy of Republic of Poland in Beijing; applications submitted in Shanghai Jurisdiction will be assessed by the Consulate General of Republic of Poland in Shanghai; application submitted in Guangzhou Jurisdiction will be assessed by the Consulate General of Republic of Poland in Guangzhou; application submitted in Chengdu will be assessed by the Consulate General of Republic of Poland in Chengdu. We offer the option of courier service for return of passport, directly to your doorstep.
If you intend to spend more than 90 days (at least 91 days) on Polish territory (either continuously or in intervals) in the half-a-year period since the date of first arrival, you must apply
                                                                for the country visa D. The country visa (D) permits for: being in Polish territory for the duration of your stay and/or for the duration period the visa was issued for; as well as being
                                                                able to travel in the other Schengen countries for up to three months during the specified half-a-year period.
- Visiting Family or Friends
- Work
- Study
- Education/Training
Important Notice
Contact Information of Poland Embassy
Jurisdiction to Apply
Information on ways how to prove necessary financial means
Insurance Policy for National Visa
Simplified visa procedure for family members of the European Union (EU) citizen
Visa guidance for guests of diplomatic mission
visa_types.full_text:
JURISDICTION TO APPLY
Applicants should submit their applications to the relevant Visa Application Centre according to their place of residence. Applications submitted in Beijing will be assessed by the Embassy of Republic of Poland in Beijing; applications submitted in Shanghai Jurisdiction will be assessed by the Consulate General of Republic of Poland in Shanghai; application submitted in Guangzhou Jurisdiction will be assessed by the Consulate General of Republic of Poland in Guangzhou; application submitted in Chengdu will be assessed by the Consulate General of Republic of Poland in Chengdu. We offer the option of courier service for return of passport, directly to your doorstep.
If you intend to spend more than 90 days (at least 91 days) on Polish territory (either continuously or in intervals) in the half-a-year period since the date of first arrival, you must apply
                                                                for the country visa D. The country visa (D) permits for: being in Polish territory for the duration of your stay and/or for the duration period the visa was issued for; as well as being
                                                                able to travel in the other Schengen countries for up to three months during the specified half-a-year period.
- Visiting Family or Friends
- Work
- Study
- Education/Training
Important Notice

visa_types.overview:
Overview
It is applicable in case you are travelling for visiting family or friends. This visa is given for a period of the stay up to 90 days within 180 days.
The following simplified visa procedure is not applicable to spouses of Polish citizens with the purpose of traveling to Poland. In such case a regular procedure needs to be followed.
Simplified visa procedure for family members of the European Union (EU) citizen
visa_types.full_text:

visa_types.overview:
Overview
It is applicable in case you are travelling for taking part in ADS events. This visa is given for a period of the stay up to 90 days within 180 days.
Below is the list of accredited commercial intermediaries which cooperate for the lodging of applications based on the granting of an accreditation(Applicable to Beijing jurisdiction):
- 北京神州国际旅行社有限公司 - BTG INTERNATIONAL TRAVEL & TOUR
- 环境在线（北京）国际旅行社有限公司 - CHINA ENVIRONMENT ONLINE (BEIJING) INTERNATIONAL TRAVEL SERVICE CO.,LTD
- 北京五洲行国际旅行社有限责任公司 - BEIJING GLOBAL TOUR INTERNATIONAL TRAVEL SERVICE CO.,LTD
- 北京广信国际旅行社有限公司 - BEIJING GUANGXIN INTERNATIONAL TRAVEL SERVICE CO.,LTD

visa_types.name: SCHENGEN VISA
visa_types.overview:
If you are planning a short visit to the Republic of Poland, you may need to apply for a Schengen visa. The Republic of Poland is one of the 29 European countries forming the Schengen Area which
                                                                have no border controls between them. These countries also issue a uniform visa, the Schengen visa for the stay up to 90 days within 180 days.
Please apply for your visa at the Consulate or Embassy of the country of your main destination. If there is no main destination, the application must be submitted to the Embassy or Consulate
                                                                General of the country where you will be staying for the longest period of time.
If no longest stay can be ascertained then you may apply at the country of the first port of entry.
- Tourist Visa
- Business Visa
- Visiting Family or Friends Visa
- Cultural/Sport event Visa
- Training/Education Exchange Visa
- ADS Group
- Others
Schengen countries: Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, the Czech Republic, Croatia, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Iceland, Italy, Liechtenstein, Lithuania,  Luxembourg, Malta, The Netherlands, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, and Switzerland.
Important Notice
Embassy Contact Information (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6t3z0WkXgv3h7rXwU6Adnj/bbbac40bf1f8a1795827ac3d8ec58ddb/poland-contact-information.pdf)
Jurisdiction to Apply
Information on ways how to prove necessary financial means
Common List of Third Countries Listed
Simplified visa procedure for family members of the European Union (EU) citizen
Information regarding the Visa Information System/VIS
Visa guidance for guests of diplomatic mission

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
It is applicable in case you are travelling for business. This visa is given for a period of the stay up to 90 days within 180 days.

## Visa Fees
Effective date: 1st Mar 2026

[Table:  Business Visa]
*Please Note：The consul reserves himself a right to change the visa fee according to the Schengen visa code and other relevant laws after reviewing the application.
Above mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid by cash or MOBILE PAYMENT in RMB.

## Exemption of Visa Fee:
- Children below 6 years on the date of submission
- School pupils, students, postgraduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake stays for the purpose of study or educational training
- Researchers from third countries travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research
- Representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organizations
- Family member of EU/EEA and Switzerland nationals

## Logistic Fee
Service Charge for Visa Application – 63 RMB per person

To make your visa application journey more comfortable, please avail benefits of our optional Additional Services. (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/pol/premium-services)
Applicants submitting visa applications for humanitarian reasons will be exempt from service fees.
Please Note: 
The applicable visa fee in RMB is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice. 

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/pol/travel-insurance)

Checklist for Business 

## Photo Specifications
Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/pol/phone-camera) to take visa photo with mobile phone
All photos must meet the requirements listed below. If these requirements have not been met, the applicant will have to deliver a new photo that meets the requirements. The photo
                                                                            requirements are the same for children as for adults.

## The Photo shall:
- be in sharp focus, clear and with good contrasts
- be printed on quality photo paper with high solution
- be in colours with a light background
- be 35x45 mm in width
- maximum 6 months old, resemble the applicant
- full-face, facing the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- show the whole head and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80 % of the picture
- show open eyes that are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes

## Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot be coloured
- the rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be reflection in the glasses

## Regarding head-dress:
Religious head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly shown.
- Chin, forehead and both cheeks shall all be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face due to the head-dress are not allowed

## Processing Time
Counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of this application is required, for example,
                                                                            when you are requested to come to an interview or submit additional documentation. 

## Download Forms
Schengen Visa Form - Online (https://eforms.vfsglobal.com/pol/en/login) 
 Schengen Visa Form 
Note - The applicant has to carry the downloaded filled form while visiting the centre for submission as a mandatory requirement. Applicants can either log in to complete the form online or download the PDF and fill it digitally.
IMPORTANT NOTE: You are requested to fill-up your online visa application form maximum 5 days prior to your scheduled appointment. Please fill in the visa application via https://eforms.vfsglobal.com/pol/en/login (https://eforms.vfsglobal.com/pol/en/login) before turning up at the visa application centre to submit your documents.

## Exemption of Visa Fee:

## Photo Specifications
Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/pol/phone-camera) to take visa photo with mobile phone
All photos must meet the requirements listed below. If these requirements have not been met, the applicant will have to deliver a new photo that meets the requirements. The photo
                                                                            requirements are the same for children as for adults.

## The Photo shall:
- be in sharp focus, clear and with good contrasts
- be printed on quality photo paper with high solution
- be in colours with a light background
- be 35x45 mm in width
- maximum 6 months old, resemble the applicant
- full-face, facing the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- show the whole head and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80 % of the picture
- show open eyes that are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes

## Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot be coloured
- the rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be reflection in the glasses

## Regarding head-dress:
Religious head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly shown.
- Chin, forehead and both cheeks shall all be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face due to the head-dress are not allowed

## Processing Time
Counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of this application is required, for example,
                                                                            when you are requested to come to an interview or submit additional documentation.
